message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Anime Tactical Simulator Unit Tier List: Best Units & Guide 2026",
  description: "Discover the ultimate Anime Tactical Simulator unit tier list for 2026. Rank the best DPS and tactical units, optimize traits, and master AFK farming.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/1e293b/fff?text=Anime+Tactical+Simulator+Tier+List",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Anime Tactical Simulator Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Anime Tactical Simulator unit tier list**: Focus on obtaining **Tactical** units like Igris and Kokushibo for end-game dominance.
- **Top DPS Units**: Goku (Awakened) and Naruto (Sage Mode) lead the meta for single-target and AoE damage.
- **Trait Synergy**: Always aim for the **Extremist + Dead Eye** or **Annihilator + Dead Eye** combinations for maximum damage output.
- **Progression Tip**: Use codes early to stack gems for essential game passes like **+2 Equips** and **Card Access**.
- **Farming Strategy**: Utilize AFK methods in the Awakening Dungeons to secure the 0.5% drop rate for the Crimson Knight.
</Callout>

Mastering the current meta requires a deep understanding of how different characters scale across various game modes. Whether you are pushing the leaderboards in the Tower or grinding raids for rare artifacts, choosing the right characters from the **Anime Tactical Simulator unit tier list** is the difference between rapid progression and getting stuck in World 3. The 2026 update has introduced several meta-shifting units, specifically in the Tactical and Secret tiers, which offer significantly higher base stats than standard Mythics. This guide provides a comprehensive breakdown of the strongest damage dealers, the most efficient trait combinations, and a step-by-step strategy for securing end-game units like Igris. By following this **Anime Tactical Simulator unit tier list**, you will optimize your resource allocation, ensuring that every gem and mythic soul spent contributes to a team capable of soloing the most difficult dungeons in the game.

<Section icon={Map} title="The Meta Hierarchy: 2026 DPS Rankings">

The current meta is divided into standard DPS units and rare Tactical units. While standard units like Goku and Naruto are excellent for mid-game progression, the end-game is dominated by units with unique scaling mechanics. Below is the definitive ranking for damage dealers based on raw output and versatility.

| Tier | Unit Name | Primary Role | Key Strength |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **S+ (Tactical)** | **Igris (Crimson Knight)** | End-game DPS | 50k+ damage potential, 0.5% drop rate |
| **S+ (Tactical)** | **Kokushibo** | Boss Killer | High base damage (14.1k+), Tactical scaling |
| **S+ (Tactical)** | **Yoruichi** | Speed/DPS | Exceptional attack speed and movement |
| **S (Meta)** | **Goku (Awakened)** | Single Target | Massive ultimate damage for raids/tower |
| **S (Meta)** | **Naruto (Sage Mode)** | AoE Specialist | Fast attack speed, clears waves quickly |
| **S (Meta)** | **Alucard** | Sustain DPS | Lifesteal passive provides high survivability |
| **A (Strong)** | **Luffy (Gear 5)** | Hybrid | Balanced AoE and single-target burst |
| **A (Strong)** | **Tanjiro** | Multi-Target | Consistent water breathing ability damage |
| **A (Strong)** | **Ichigo (Bankai)** | Ranged DPS | High burst from safe positioning |
| **B (Early)** | **Deku** | Starter DPS | Reliable scaling until World 3 |
| **B (Early)** | **Asta** | Physical Burst | Strong but lacks necessary range |

<Callout type="tip" title="Resource Management">
Do not spread your resources thin by leveling every unit. Focus your Mythic Souls and Ascension materials on 2-3 S-Tier units to maximize your progression speed through the Demon Slayer and Solo Leveling worlds.
</Callout>

**Video Highlights:**
- **Fast Progression**: How to use codes and gems to bypass early-game hurdles.
- **Ascension Mechanics**: Using duplicates to achieve 100% bonus damage on your top units.
- **Tactical Units**: Why Kokushibo and Yoruichi are essential for high-level raids.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="q3X3ieusO9A" title="Best Beginners Guide For Anime Tactical Simulator" />

</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="Tactical Units and Raid Strategies">

Tactical units represent a tier above Secret units, often requiring specific boss drops or raid completions. These units, such as Kokushibo and Yoruichi, are found in the Demon Slayer world and have a 5% drop rate from the main boss fight.

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="Kokushibo">
    - **Damage**: 14.1k+ base
    - **Scaling**: Tactical
    - **Best Use**: High-level Boss Raids
  </Card>
  <Card title="Yoruichi">
    - **Damage**: High DPS
    - **Scaling**: Tactical
    - **Best Use**: Speed Clearing Dungeons
  </Card>
  <Card title="Igris">
    - **Damage**: 50k Max
    - **Scaling**: Tactical (0.5%)
    - **Best Use**: Ultimate End-game Content
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

To obtain these units efficiently, players must grind the Demon Slayer boss fight. This fight provides not only the units themselves but also the medals required to roll for top-tier traits.

| Boss Reward | Drop Chance | Usage |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Tactical Units** | 5% | Core team members for high DPS |
| **Trait Medals** | 100% | Used to roll for Annihilator or Extremist |
| **Gems** | High | Purchasing Game Passes and Summons |
| **Artifacts** | Low | Passive stat boosts for the entire team |

<Callout type="warning" title="Boss Difficulty">
The Demon Slayer world boss is a significant difficulty spike. Ensure your team is fully ascended (at least 2-3 stars) before attempting to solo this encounter for Tactical units.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Trait Optimization and Talent Rolling">

Traits are the most critical factor in determining a unit's viability in the **Anime Tactical Simulator unit tier list**. Even a lower-tier unit can outperform an S-tier unit if it has superior traits. The community consensus among leaderboard players is that crit chance and ability damage are the highest priorities.

| Trait Name | Buff Effects | Synergy Level |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Extremist** | +100% Damage, +50% Ability Dmg, -25% Speed | ★★★★★ (Best with Dead Eye) |
| **Annihilator** | +100% Raw Damage | ★★★★★ (Best with Dead Eye) |
| **Dead Eye** | +50% Critical Hit Chance | ★★★★★ (Essential for DPS) |
| **God's Blessing** | +150% Luck (Stackable) | ★★★★☆ (Best for Luck Teams) |
| **King Slayer** | Massive damage against Bosses | ★★★★☆ (Raid Specific) |
| **Fortune I** | +20% Luck | ★★★☆☆ (Early Luck Build) |

<Callout type="success" title="The God Combo">
The absolute best combination for end-game DPS is **Extremist and Dead Eye**. This provides a massive 100% damage boost and significantly increases the frequency of critical hits, which is vital for clearing the Awakening Dungeons.
</Callout>

For units dedicated to farming, focus on **God's Blessing** or **Fortune**. A full luck team with the Richie Armor (20% luck) and Sunju Raid accessories can reach over 2,000% luck, making secret drops significantly more common.

</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="AFK Farming Guide: Securing Igris">

Igris, also known as the Crimson Knight, is currently the strongest unit in the game. With a 0.5% drop rate from the Awakening Dungeon, most players will need to utilize AFK farming methods to obtain him.

**Video Highlights:**
- **TinyTask Setup**: Configuring software for 24/7 automated dungeon runs.
- **Camera Positioning**: The specific angles required to ensure the "E" interact prompt works.
- **Success Rate**: How to achieve an 80%+ success rate while away from your PC.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="zkUcbi3uVLI" title="How to AFK Grind Igris Easily" />

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Software Setup">
    Download a macro tool like TinyTask. Set the playback speed to 1x and ensure "Continuous Playback" is checked in the settings.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Positioning">
    Travel to the Awakening Dungeons. Disable your mount and set your camera to a top-down view. Align your character slightly to the left of the center of the boss spawn area.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Recording the Loop">
    Start recording. Attack the boss, wait for the kill, walk to the reward chest, press "E" to collect, and then use the travel menu to reset the dungeon. Stop recording once you are back at the start.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Reward Management">
    Ensure your inventory has space. Even if you don't drop Igris immediately, you will collect Heroic Shields and Richie Armor which are essential for your luck team.
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Callout type="info" title="Pity System">
If you are extremely unlucky with the 0.5% drop, you can obtain a guaranteed Igris by completing the quest for 120 Crimson Knight kills.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="Essential Game Passes and Progression">

Progression in Anime Tactical Simulator is heavily gated by your equip limit and luck stats. While the game is free-to-play friendly, you must prioritize your gems on specific game passes available in the lobby.

| Game Pass | Cost (Gems) | Priority | Benefit |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **+2 Equips** | 3,000 - 7,000 | **Critical** | Allows more units in battle for higher total DPS |
| **Card Access** | 5,000+ | **High** | Enables background rolling while you grind raids |
| **2x Gold** | 4,000 | **Medium** | Speeds up early-game progression and talent rolling |
| **VIP** | 7,000 | **Medium** | General buffs and exclusive rewards |
| **Fast Spins** | 3,000 | **Low** | Only useful for end-game artifact farming |

<Checklist
  id="endgame-checklist"
  title="End-Game Readiness Checklist:"
  items={[
    "Obtain at least 3 Tactical units (Kokushibo/Yoruichi/Igris)",
    "Roll Extremist + Dead Eye on your primary DPS",
    "Equip a full Luck Team with Fortune or God's Blessing traits",
    "Complete all Shenron wishes for the extra Card Pack slot",
    "Reach 100% Ascension on your top 2 damage dealers"
  ]}
/>

<Callout type="tip" title="Shenron Orbs">
Grind for the seven Dragon Balls to unlock Shenron wishes. Your first priority should be the **+1 Card Pack** wish, followed by the **+1 Luck** wish to aid in secret hunting.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Frequently Asked Questions">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "What is the best unit in the Anime Tactical Simulator unit tier list?",
    answer: "Currently, Igris (Crimson Knight) is the best unit due to his 50k max damage potential and superior scaling. However, Kokushibo and Yoruichi are the best accessible Tactical units for most players."
  },
  {
    question: "How do I increase my luck for better unit drops?",
    answer: "You can increase luck by rolling the God's Blessing trait, equipping the Richie Armor (20% luck) from the Igris raid, and using Shenron's luck wish. A dedicated luck team is essential for finding 0.5% drops."
  },
  {
    question: "Which traits should I prioritize for my DPS units?",
    answer: "The priority traits are Extremist, Annihilator, and Dead Eye. Combining Extremist or Annihilator with Dead Eye provides the highest damage output in the game."
  },
  {
    question: "Can I get game passes without spending Robux?",
    answer: "Yes, you can purchase most game passes using gems. Gems are earned by completing Tower floors, achievements, and using active community codes."
  }
]} />

</Section>
